key_strategy.item_key_space: Preserve legacy CF-* seam identifiers as stable backlog item keys during migration to backlog-engineer.
key_strategy.delivery_state_rule: Legacy intaken maps to implemented by explicit operator instruction; confirmed maps to planned; remaining candidate seams stay defined unless a carried migration gap blocks them.
key_strategy.source_traceability: Architecture and legacy planning inputs stay attached through registered source IDs, while current truth is read from backlog-engineer state after packet apply.

as_built.note: Current follow-up state after real-serving closure: CF-023 moved to implemented, while smoke-harness optimization continues as separate backlog delta CF-028.

items.title: Оптимизация smoke harness после real vLLM/Gemma runtime
